name: GPT-5.4
description: Flagship model. Highest reasoning capability, 1M+ context. General availability Feb 2026.

name: GPT-5.2
description: High-performance workhorse. Excellent cost-to-quality for complex enterprise tasks.

name: GPT-5-mini
description: Fast, affordable. Best fit for content generation, summarization, and high-volume tasks.

name: GPT-5-nano
description: Ultra-low-cost model for classification, batch tagging, and simple extraction at scale.

name: GPT-4.1
description: Long-context capable. Strong coding and analytical performance. 1M token window.

name: GPT-4.1-mini
description: Efficient long-context model. Ideal for chat assistants and document-grounded QA.

name: o4-mini
description: Fast reasoning model. Multi-step problem solving with visible chain-of-thought.

name: o3
description: Advanced reasoning. Highest accuracy on complex math, science, and code tasks.

name: text-embedding-3-large
description: High-dimensional embeddings (3072d). Best retrieval quality for RAG and semantic search.

name: GPT-4o
description: Legacy flagship. Deprecated Q1 2026. Migrate to GPT-5.2 or GPT-5-mini.
